blockers.blocked_by: A launcher-driven runtime verification path now exists and has produced evidence for email_register, plans, and subscription_detail/current_subscription, but full page-by-page coverage is still incomplete. Remaining blocker is finishing P2 Extended realification and scaling route-by-route runtime evidence across all audited pages.

mainline.policy: Use the strict A/B/C/D page reality standard. Audit is complete: 46 pages audited, A=0, B=11, C=17, D=18. Rework is active: P0/P1 slices compile in clean worktrees; P2 Core was accepted into integration; P2 Extended screen rendering is being switched from hardcoded pseudo-business copy to uiState-driven rendering. Runtime verification now has a launcher-driven entry tracked under liaojiang-0jp.8, and it has already uncovered and fixed a real plans-route crash. The remaining task is to expand that evidence to all remaining pages, not to re-audit.
